name: HAMMER TECHNOLOGY HOLDINGS CORP.
summary: Our Corporate History and Background The Company was incorporated in the State of Nevada on September 23, 2010, under the name Recursos Montana S.A. The Company's principal activity was as a pre-exploration stage company engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties then owned by the Company.
